audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone, with no significant prosody or background noise.
temporal_description: A man in a gray suit holds a phone to his ear, standing in a dimly lit, industrial-looking space with metal bars in the background. Behind him, several other men are visible, some seated and others standing, all appearing to be observing or waiting. The camera then shifts to a close-up of a man’s face, partially obscured by metal bars, with his gaze directed forward. The scene transitions to a close-up of a hand gripping a metal bar, fingers tightly curled around it, suggesting tension or restraint. The lighting is low and greenish, casting shadows and emphasizing the confined, gritty environment.
